item.title: 10 Best AI Newsletters you must Subscribe to
item.description: This curated list of the top 10 AI newsletters for 2024 will help you stay at the forefront of industry developments, delivering insights directly to your inbox. Whether you're a seasoned expert or just beginning your journey in AI and security, these newsletters offer valuable perspectives and timely updates.

item.title: 90% of Successful Attacks Seen in the Wild Resulted in Leaked Sensitive Data
item.description: 90% of Successful Attacks Seen in the Wild Resulted in Leaked Sensitive Data

item.title: A Deep Dive into LLM Jailbreaking Techniques and Their Implications
item.description: Discover how Large Language Models like ChatGPT are vulnerable to jailbreaking techniques such as prompt injection and stylizing. This blog explores various attack methods with real-world examples and highlights the critical importance of robust AI guardrails and security measures to protect against malicious exploits.

item.title: A Milestone for Pillar: Honored as Frost & Sullivan's 2025 Competitive Strategy Leader for AI Security
item.description: A Milestone for Pillar: Honored as Frost & Sullivan's 2025 Competitive Strategy Leader for AI Security

item.title: Addressing Vertical Agentic Risks with Taint Analysis
item.description: Addressing Vertical Agentic Risks with Taint Analysis

item.title: Agentic Use Cases and Challenges for 2025
item.description: Agentic Use Cases and Challenges for 2025

item.title: AI Agents in the Workforce: The Future of Team Collaboration and Efficiency
item.description: AI Agents in the Workforce: The Future of Team Collaboration and Efficiency

item.title: AI Asset Inventory: The Foundation of AI Governance and Security
item.description: AI Asset Inventory: The Foundation of AI Governance and Security

item.title: AI Red Teaming: Ensuring Safe and Secure AI Systems
item.description: AI Red Teaming: Ensuring Safe and Secure AI Systems

item.title: AI Red Teaming Playbook
item.description: AI Red Teaming Playbook

item.title: AI Red Teaming Regulations and Standards
item.description: Explore the critical role of AI red teaming in securing AI systems. Learn about key regulations like the US Executive Order and EU AI Act, model provider best practices from OpenAI, Google, and Amazon, and essential AI security frameworks such as NIST, MITRE ATLAS, and OWASP LLM Top 10. Discover how Pillar Security’s advanced red teaming solutions help organizations identify and mitigate AI vulnerabilities, ensuring safe and reliable AI deployments.

item.title: AI Security Trends to Watch in 2025
item.description: AI Security Trends to Watch in 2025

item.title: AI Systems Must Be Secured By Design
item.description: AI Systems Must Be Secured By Design

item.title: Analyzing the Amazon Q Incident Using the SAIL Framework
item.description: Analyzing the Amazon Q Incident Using the SAIL Framework

item.title: Anatomy of an Indirect Prompt Injection
item.description: Anatomy of an Indirect Prompt Injection

item.title: “Ask Gordon, Meet the Attacker” - Prompt Injection in Docker’s Built-in AI Assistant
item.description: Pillar Security researchers discovered a prompt injection vulnerability in Docker's Ask Gordon AI assistant that allows attackers to exfiltrate sensitive data through poisoned repository metadata.

item.title: Best Practices for Securely Deploying AI Systems: Insights from NSA's Latest Report
item.description: Best Practices for Securely Deploying AI Systems: Insights from NSA's Latest Report

item.title: Beyond DevSecOps: Pillar’s Approach for Securing Agentic AI
item.description: Beyond DevSecOps: Pillar’s Approach for Securing Agentic AI

item.title: Building AI-Powered Software? Prepare to Answer These 11 Security Questions
item.description: You've integrated AI into your product, and your customers are demanding answers around security and privacy? Drawing from real-world security reviews and direct customer interactions, we've distilled the 11 most frequent and impactful AI security questions your customers are actually asking—and how Pillar Security empowers teams to answer these confidently and comprehensively.

item.title: Building Secure and Reliable AI Agents: A New Development Life Cycle
item.description: Explore how AI-powered agents are revolutionizing software development with a new lifecycle focused on design, deployment, evaluation, and validation. Learn about essential safety and security practices to build reliable AI systems and discover how Pillar Security ensures robust protection throughout the AI agent development process.

item.title: Building Your AI Security Roadmap
item.description: Building Your AI Security Roadmap

item.title: California's SB 1047: A Landmark Bill for Safe and Responsible AI Innovation
item.description: California's SB 1047: A Landmark Bill for Safe and Responsible AI Innovation

item.title: Caught in the Wild: Real Attack Traffic Targeting Exposed Clawdbot Gateways
item.description: Caught in the Wild: Real Attack Traffic Targeting Exposed Clawdbot Gateways

item.title: Code Red: In the Age of AI, Your Data is Executable
item.description: We've entered the Intelligence Age, powered by foundation models and the increasingly sophisticated agentic systems they enable. And in this new era, something profound has shifted under our feet: data has become executable.

item.title: Deep Dive Into The Latest Jailbreak Techniques We've Seen In The Wild
item.description: Deep Dive Into The Latest Jailbreak Techniques We've Seen In The Wild

item.title: Embracing Security in AI: Unpacking the New ISO/IEC 5338 Standard
item.description: Learn about proactive risk management, data protection, continuous validation, and the crucial role of human oversight. Discover how Pillar Security’s comprehensive solutions help organizations build secure, reliable, and ISO-compliant AI applications. Ensure your AI is protected and trustworthy with Pillar’s expert guidance.

item.title: From data breaches to legal liabilities: The hidden risks of AI chatbots
item.description: From data breaches to legal liabilities: The hidden risks of AI chatbots

item.title: From Discovery to Large-Scale Validation: Chat Template Backdoors Across 18 Models and 4 Engines
item.description: From Discovery to Large-Scale Validation: Chat Template Backdoors Across 18 Models and 4 Engines

item.title: From Rules to Guardrails: Navigating the New Age of AI with Security at Heart
item.description: Discover how generative AI transforms software from rigid rules to flexible guardrails, enhancing creativity and security. Explore key insights on building trustworthy AI systems in this new era.

item.title: From Shift Left to Shift Up: Securing the New AI Abstraction Layer
item.description: AI introduces a powerful new abstraction layer - one that makes autonomous decisions and operates beyond human oversight. To address its inherent risks, we must shift our security focus upwards: from simply protecting code to securing the business logic and processes AI now controls. This “Shift Up” approach calls for purpose-built controls specifically designed to safeguard the AI decision-making layer, preventing risks from cascading into critical business impacts.
